channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole, 31st May
item.description:
Pothole centre of Albion Street near junction with Grosvenor Place South
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11;11A, Grosvenor Place South, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Large pot hole on footpath, 31st May
item.description:
In the foot path at end of Marten Close, Abbeymead

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marten Close, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath access blocked by gate operated by livery yard, 31st May
item.description:
Footpath access is completely blocked on the section that runs through the livery yard (Church lane / cowlsmead intersection in Shurdington, Gloucestershire) by white gated entry only and does not open for members of the public. By chance, spoke with a woman 31/05/26 assumed associated with the livery yard (who drove in when gate opened for her) who confirmed foot path was not closed but there was an alternative route. This had been a long-prolonged issue spanning many months. Alternative route does not offer explanation why footpath running through the livery yard has been deliberately restricted.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Lane, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree blocking bridleway., 31st May
item.description:
Bridleway blocked approx 100m from Limekilns junction of paths. Obstruction is passable with care for walkers with good mobility but probably not passable for those with restricted mobility, horses or bicycles.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Standard Gauge Incline, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The bus stop was knocked over a long time ago and has never been replaced, 31st May
item.description:
The bus stop opposite Southern Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Bath Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Surely this whole road is next on the list?, 31st May
item.description:
I’m amazed it’s got this bad.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Rowanfield Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Why do you keep closing this down with no further action required?, 31st May
item.description:
Reported several times by various different people. Real problem area. Could you give us all an explanation as to why you close down each report with no action required? Why can’t just put in some arrows and/or write ‘Ring Road’ in the left or right hand lane here. Either is fine. No one cares which. We are all just asking for a clear definitive direction so that people stop cutting each other up trying to use both lanes to go to the ring road/Costa/BMW. You have several people mentioning it now, and you keep closing with no further action. Why? Have you driven this road and seen how often people get confused? Have you seen how fast people speed round either trying to make it work or just to prove a point? It’s baffling you continue to allow the ambiguity here rather than send out a team with some white paint and be done with it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatherley Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: Road is disintegrating and needs resurfacing., 30th May
item.description:
A few yards up from the junction. The photo is from two years ago. Now much worse. Horrible to drive over.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2a, Rowanfield Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Grass needs cutting especially outside the gramge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury

item.title: Please erect bus stop here bus driving past intending passenger, 30th May
item.description:
There is a bus stop outside new dawn close however there is no pole or flag
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury

item.title: Fly tipping, 30th May
item.description:
Fly tipped single armchair in Elmfield Park near Marsh Lane entrance. Started out at top of Marsh Lane a few weeks ago and is now here.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18,20,22,24, Elmfield Avenue, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Fly tipping, 30th May
item.description:
White double mattress fly tipped against the fence of Hardwick Green on Swindon Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint Paul's Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Esso longlevens service station, 30th May
item.description:
The car looks absolutely fine; however, it has been parked on the premises for the last five days. There are lockers around the vehicle and a bin behind it, which makes it difficult for locker delivery drivers, bin collection vehicles, and other delivery vehicles to access the premises. Could you please remove the vehicle as soon as possible? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 131, Cheltenham Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped fridge freezer on pavement of Grosvenor street, 30th May
item.description:
Flytipped fridge freezer on pavement of Grosvenor street. This has been here several months and is obstructing the pavement and is a safety hazard for pedestrians and disabled people.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Grosvenor Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass is too long on the chicane. I cannot see cars coming on the other side of the road because my car is low., 30th May
item.description:
Chicane on Gotherington Lane near Bishops Cleeve
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gotherington Lane, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown grass verges, 30th May
item.description:
All Abbotswood Road Estate. Further to previous posts I am reiterating the problem of very bad overgrown verges. The grass verges have become unsightly and some are as high as a car. Even the walkways are so overgrown that my husband cannot use them with his mobility scooter. This is an housing estate not a highway and is now looking like a forgotten untidy place to live. Could you please send a representative of your department to urgently view the matter. I do not think a mower would even get near to do the job.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbotswood Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are potholes all along the N Upton Ln road from Barnwood Rd to Crasby Cl.. They are very bad for my car, not to mention the danger they pose to bike riders., 30th May
item.description:
There is a chain of potholes all along the N Upton Ln road, starting not far from the zebra crossing and continuing all the way to around Crasby Cl from Barnwood road direction.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Upton Lane, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
